history.en: Developed by monks in the Flanders region of medieval Europe as cattle herding and all-purpose farm dog. Used to drive cattle, pull carts, and serve as a watchdog. Nearly extinct after World War I but revived by dedicated breeders.
history.zh: 中世纪欧洲佛兰德斯地区的僧侣培育而成，作为牧牛犬和全能农场犬。用于驱赶牛群、拉车和看门。第一次世界大战后几乎灭绝，但由专注的繁育者复兴。

overview.en: The Bouvier des Flandres is a large, sturdy herding breed originally from the Flanders region of Belgium. Bred by monks as an all-purpose farm dog, it combines intelligence, loyalty, and a protective nature with a calm, gentle temperament. These dogs are courageous and devoted to their family, making them excellent watchdogs and companions. Their thick, rough double coat gives them a rugged, unkempt appearance. Despite their size, they are surprisingly agile and possess a strong work ethic. They thrive on having a job to do and bond deeply with their owners. Early socialization is key to ensure they remain well-mannered and confident. Overall, the Bouvier is a balanced, dependable breed that excels in both working roles and family life.
overview.zh: 弗兰德牧牛犬是一种大型、结实的牧牛犬，原产于比利时的弗兰德地区。由僧侣培育为全能农场犬，兼具智慧、忠诚和保护性，同时性情冷静温和。这些犬勇敢且忠于家庭，是优秀的看门犬和伴侣犬。其浓密的双层粗毛赋予它们粗犷不羁的外观。尽管体型庞大，它们却出奇地敏捷，并拥有强烈的职业道德感。它们需要有任务在身，并与主人建立深厚的情感纽带。早期社会化至关重要，以确保它们举止得体且自信从容。总体而言，弗兰德牧牛犬是一种平衡、可靠的犬种，无论是在工作角色还是家庭生活中都表现出色。

care.en: Daily care for a Bouvier des Flandres requires commitment. Their thick, wiry coat needs brushing at least three times a week to prevent matting, with more frequent grooming during shedding seasons. Professional hand-stripping or clipping every 6-8 weeks is recommended. They are moderate shedders. Exercise needs are high—at least one hour of vigorous activity daily, such as long walks, jogging, or interactive play. They enjoy herding games and agility. Regular veterinary check-ups are essential, including hip and elbow evaluations, eye exams, and monitoring for bloat. Nail trimming every few weeks and ear cleaning to prevent infections should be part of the routine. Mental stimulation through puzzle toys or training sessions is equally important to prevent boredom.
care.zh: 弗兰德牧牛犬的日常护理需要投入大量精力。它们浓密粗糙的被毛每周至少需要梳理三次，以防止打结，换毛季需更频繁地梳理。建议每6-8周进行专业手工拔毛或修剪。它们属于中度掉毛犬种。运动需求很高——每天至少需要一小时的高强度活动，例如长距离散步、慢跑或互动游戏。它们喜欢牧牛游戏和敏捷训练。定期兽医检查至关重要，包括髋关节和肘关节评估、眼部检查以及防范胃扭转。每几周修剪一次指甲，并定期清洁耳朵以预防感染。通过益智玩具或训练课程提供精神刺激同样重要，以防止无聊行为。

training.en: Training a Bouvier des Flandres requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. They are highly intelligent and eager to please but can be independent and stubborn at times. Early socialization from puppyhood is crucial to develop a well-adjusted adult. Use reward-based methods—treats, praise, and play—rather than harsh corrections, as they respond poorly to force. Obedience training should be structured yet varied to keep their interest. They excel in advanced activities like herding trials, agility, and carting. A firm but gentle handler who establishes clear leadership will earn their respect. Training sessions should be short and engaging. Avoid repetitive drills, as boredom can lead to disobedience. With the right approach, they become reliable, responsive companions.
training.zh: 训练弗兰德牧牛犬需要耐心、一致性和正向强化。它们非常聪明且乐于取悦主人，但有时也会表现出独立和固执。从幼犬期开始进行早期社会化至关重要，以培养出适应良好的成年犬。使用基于奖励的方法——零食、赞美和游戏——而不是严厉的纠正，因为强迫方式效果不佳。服从训练应结构清晰但富有变化，以保持它们的兴趣。它们在高级活动中表现出色，例如牧牛测试、敏捷训练和拉车。一位坚定而温和、能建立明确领导地位的主人会赢得它们的尊重。训练时间应简短且有趣。避免重复枯燥的练习，因为无聊可能导致不服从。采用正确的方法，它们会成为可靠、反应灵敏的伴侣。

diet.en: The Bouvier des Flandres requires a high-quality, balanced diet formulated for large, active breeds. Feed a protein-rich diet (22-26% protein) with moderate fat to support muscle maintenance and energy levels. Portion control is critical to prevent obesity, which can stress joints. Typically, adults need 3-5 cups of dry kibble daily, divided into two meals. Puppies should eat three to four smaller meals per day. Include omega-3 fatty acids for coat health and glucosamine/chondroitin for joint support. Avoid over-supplementation; consult a vet for specific needs. Fresh water must always be available. Be cautious with bloat risk—avoid vigorous exercise immediately before or after meals. Consider slow-feed bowls to reduce gulping. Treats should not exceed 10% of daily calories.
diet.zh: 弗兰德牧牛犬需要为大型活跃犬种设计的高质量、均衡饮食。喂食富含蛋白质（22%-26%蛋白质）和适量脂肪的食物，以支持肌肉维持和能量水平。控制食量至关重要，以防止肥胖给关节带来压力。通常成年犬每天需要3-5杯干粮，分两餐喂食。幼犬应每天分三到四餐少量多餐。添加Omega-3脂肪酸以促进被毛健康，以及葡萄糖胺和软骨素以支持关节。避免过度补充营养；请咨询兽医了解特定需求。始终提供新鲜饮用水。注意胃扭转风险——避免在餐前或餐后立即进行剧烈运动。考虑使用慢食碗以减少狼吞虎咽。零食不应超过每日总热量的10%。

livingTips.en: The Bouvier des Flandres can adapt to apartment living if given sufficient daily exercise, but a home with a securely fenced yard is ideal. They are moderately active indoors but need space to roam. This breed is excellent with children when properly socialized, displaying patience and a protective instinct. They generally get along with other dogs and pets if raised together, though their herding instincts may prompt them to chase or nip. Supervision is recommended with smaller animals. They are not excessive barkers but will alert you to strangers. Their calm, steady nature makes them good for families, but they are not recommended for first-time owners due to their size and training needs. They thrive on human companionship and should not be left alone for long periods.
livingTips.zh: 弗兰德牧牛犬如果每天得到充足的运动，可以适应公寓生活，但拥有带安全围栏的庭院最为理想。它们在室内活动量适中，但需要有空间自由走动。如果经过适当社会化，这个犬种对孩子非常友好，表现出耐心和保护本能。如果从小一起饲养，它们通常能与其他狗和宠物和睦相处，但牧牛本能可能使它们追逐或轻咬。建议在与小型动物相处时进行监督。它们不是过度吠叫的犬种，但会向陌生人发出警报。其冷静稳重的性格使其适合家庭，但由于体型和训练需求，不建议首次养狗者饲养。它们依赖人类陪伴，不应长时间独处。
